symptoms.symptom_name: Disclosed physical assault by caregiver (arm grabbing/twisting)

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: elder abuse and neglect with an infected leg ulcer
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Explicit, corroborated disclosure of assault is a defining feature of physical elder abuse.

symptoms.symptom_name: Fingertip-pattern bruising on both upper arms

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: elder abuse and neglect with an infected leg ulcer
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Fingertip/grip bruise distribution is characteristic of forceful grabbing; documentation needs in-person examination.
Grip-pattern bruising with a disclosed mechanism argues against innocent accidental injury.

symptoms.symptom_name: Untreated foul-smelling weeping lower-leg ulcer with surrounding redness

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Infected venous lower-leg ulcer with surrounding cellulitis
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Purulent, malodorous, erythematous ulcer indicates local infection; staging and treatment need hands-on care.
Systemic features of infection in a frail elder raise sepsis concern and mandate urgent in-person assessment.

symptoms.symptom_name: Low-grade fever (measured 37.6 C by the clinician)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Objective temperature is a clinician measurement; the AI can only note the caregiver's report of feeling hot, unverified.

symptoms.symptom_name: Elevated blood pressure 160/90 from withheld antihypertensives

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Uncontrolled hypertension from withheld antihypertensive medication
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Objective BP is a sealed clinician measurement; consistent with a week of withheld medication.

symptoms.symptom_name: Padlocked bedroom door and disconnected landline (forced confinement/isolation)

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: elder abuse and neglect with an infected leg ulcer
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Environmental evidence of confinement corroborates the abuse account and defines immediate risk.

symptoms.symptom_name: Withheld blood-pressure and antibiotic medications for a week

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: elder abuse and neglect with an infected leg ulcer
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Deliberate medication withholding is a coercive-control and neglect feature, and drives both the uncontrolled BP and the worsening infection.

symptoms.symptom_name: Fearful, withdrawn demeanour toward the caregiver; restricted mobility (frame withheld)

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: elder abuse and neglect with an infected leg ulcer
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Fearfulness in the caregiver's presence and imposed immobility are recognised behavioural/functional markers of abuse and neglect.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: In-person clinical assessment with vital signs and sepsis screen (bloods/cultures)
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: A febrile frail elder with an untreated infected ulcer needs urgent in-person vitals and bloods to confirm or exclude sepsis — none of which the AI can obtain remotely.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: In-person documentation of injuries for the safeguarding/legal record
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: The bruise pattern and neglect must be examined and documented in person as part of the safeguarding response.
